item.name: Fleeting Squid
item.description:
When winter descends upon Kugane and its vibrant flora wilts, some look to the sea, where the skin of this cephalopod reminds them of warmer seasons.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This wavekin's body is shaped like a leaf, and its color changes to adapt to its environment. A school of fleeting squid swimming through a spectral current looks like an upside down forest, inviting one to become lost among its sunken paths.
